name: Renovate or Rebuild
overview: An all-star cast of former contestants from Channel Nine’s The Block compete to convince a family that they have the best solution to providing more space, comfort and reduced energy bills. Team Renovate believe the family should renovate their existing home, while Team Rebuild think the family should knock down and rebuild.

trailers.title: Renovate or Rebuild Season 1 is Coming Soon featuring your favourite characters from "The Block"
